name: Qadabra
description: Qadabra browser extension — wallet, ads, and silent sign-in across publisher widgets.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; frame-src https://qadabra.app https://*.qadabra.app https://qlarius.gigalixirapp.com https://localhost:4001 http://localhost:4000; connect-src 'self' https://qadabra.app https://*.qadabra.app https://qlinkin.bio https://www.qlinkin.bio wss://qadabra.app wss://*.qadabra.app https://qlarius.gigalixirapp.com wss://qlarius.gigalixirapp.com https://localhost:4001 http://localhost:4000 ws://localhost:4000 wss://localhost:4001
